channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road not repaved, 23rd July
item.description:
Earlier this year the majority of commercial way was repaved between Southampton way and Peckham hill Street. A significant area between chandler way and sumner way was not. This is a very rough patch of road which is horrible to cycle down. There was talk of implementing a bike lane on commercial way years ago but nothing has been done about it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further pothole in C14 cycle path, 23rd July
item.description:
Hi there, This is a secondary report of potholes / uneven dangerous surface in C14 cycle path. This is a heavily used cycle path and some of the surface issues are very dangerous for users. Thanks, Maeve

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverside, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken door in subway, 23rd July
item.description:
Broken door in subway been like this for years now still not fixed

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath blocked, 23rd July
item.description:
Footpath blocked made to walk into the road as overgrown bushes

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pot hole in C14 cycle path, 23rd July
item.description:
Hi there, this is a particularly bad pothole along the C14 cycle path. I'd recommend it be dealt with as a matter of urgency as there is a huge amount of cycle traffic along this stretch and I honestly feel someone will be badly injured. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverside, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on unnumbered green BT box in Linkfield, 22nd July
item.description:
There is graffiti on the unnumbered green BT box in Linkfield off Mead Way. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linkfield, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street weeds growing in kerbs in Bourne Vale running parallel with Wensum Place, 22nd July
item.description:
There are street weeds growing in the kerbs in Bourne Vale that run parallel with Wensum Place. Please would you arrange for the weeds to be sprayed with weedkiller and the 'die back' picked up and removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost light bulb not working, 22nd July
item.description:
The street light lamppost is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light broken, 22nd July
item.description:
There is a broken street light near the top of Halifax Street towards the roundabout on Dartmouth Road. The light isn't working and plants have grown up the light. Without the light, that part of the street is very dark and doesn't feel safe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halifax Street, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been here over a month, 22nd July
item.description:
Including industrial gas bottles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Madron Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped plant pot, 22nd July
item.description:
Dumped plant pot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chantrey Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair, 22nd July
item.description:
Chair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chantrey Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near lamppost, 22nd July
item.description:
Vehicle has been dumped here for over 6 months and obstucting residents parking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Arbrook Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking Sign Has Been Hit & Leaning, 22nd July
item.description:
Signpost advising pavement parking has been hit by a vehicle and is dangerously leaning. Please can this be investigated and fixed? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchfields Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Flyposting, 22nd July
item.description:
Similar (but additional to) FixMyStreet ref: 9786159, there are high mounted flyposts mounted on the zebra crossing lights. Please can these be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both street lights in New Church Rd not working, 22nd July
item.description:
There are just two street lights on new Church Rd, SE5 7JH. Neither of them are working for a while. It is a busy cut through for pedestrians, currently unsafe after dark because of this Please fix them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitti, 22nd July
item.description:
Very upsetting as outside our homes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy street, 22nd July
item.description:
Once again, Bostall Manorway looks absolutely disgusting. There is rubbish everywhere. Cans, plastic bottles, glass bottles, food wrappers. It is not safe with all the broken glass around.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy Street, 22nd July
item.description:
The amount of rubbish in the gutters along Abbey Wood Road is not acceptable. It is particularly bad at the junction with Bostall Manorway, around the convenience store. I'm guessing your response will be that it will be done in the normal rotation, but this is clearly not regular enough, as rubbish quickly builds up again. It's a danger to children and dogs with all the broken glass around.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate gate locking mechanism broken, 22nd July
item.description:
The gate to this estate has been broken again with the lock mechanism completely removed. Gate is now unlocked and can be accessed by non residents for parking which happens and overwhelms the estate
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapledene Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
